phase_history.notes: Two-component architecture: Python gesture engine + JUCE MIDI router plugin.
Complexity 3/5. Phased implementation: Python engine first, JUCE plugin second.
Python engine + JUCE plugin both working. Tested in Logic with hand_z controlling filter cutoff (CC74).

architecture_notes.component_1_python: gesture_engine/ — OpenCV + MediaPipe Tasks API 0.10.33 + one-euro filter → OSC /gesture/lanes [f×8]
architecture_notes.component_2_juce: VST3/AU MIDI Effect — OSCReceiver + atomic lane buffer + per-lane curve/scale → MIDI CC out
architecture_notes.camera_source: Continuity Camera via USB-C (requires iPhone unlocked/trusted on first connect)
architecture_notes.mediapipe_api: Tasks API (mp.solutions removed in 0.10.18+), model: hand_landmarker.task
architecture_notes.threading_model: OSC writes std::atomic<float>[8]; processBlock reads atomics — lock-free
architecture_notes.smoothing: One-euro filter in Python only (plugin-side IIR removed — caused startup lag)

known_issues.hand_z_range: Tuned for Mac Mini + iPhone via USB at arm's length: (hand_size - 0.08) / 0.20. May need re-tuning for different distances.
known_issues.continuity_camera: Mac Mini has no built-in camera. iPhone connects via USB-C, must be unlocked and trusted. Continuity Camera toggle hidden on Mac Mini (no built-in cam).
known_issues.python_version: mediapipe/opencv installed on Python 3.12 (/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.12/). Use that interpreter explicitly.
known_issues.model_file: hand_landmarker.task (~8MB) in gesture_engine/ — not committed to git (add to .gitignore)

framework_selection.rationale: Live 8-lane meters, mapping matrix, curve editors — WebView strength.
